zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean de Luxembourg Comte de Saint-Pol於1370年出生在法國巴-諾門迪曼其波奧沃易時，他的父親Guy I de Luxembourg30歲，母親Mahaut de Châtillon35歲。他於1390年之前與Marguerite d'Enghien Comtesse de Brienne結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1397年享年27歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean de Luxembourg Comte de Saint-Pol于1370年出生在法国巴-諾門迪曼其波奧沃易时，他的父亲Guy I de Luxembourg30岁，母亲Mahaut de Châtillon35岁。他于1390年之前与Marguerite d'Enghien Comtesse de Brienne结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1397年享年27岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Jean de Luxembourg Comte de Saint-Pol was born in 1370, in Beauvoir, Manche, Lower Normandy, France, his father, Guy I de Luxembourg, was 30 and his mother, Mahaut de Châtillon, was 35. He married Marguerite d'Enghien Comtesse de Brienne before 1390. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1397, at the age of 27.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean de Luxembourg Comte de Saint-Pol est né en 1370, à Beauvoir, Manche, Basse-Normandie, France, son père, Guy I de Luxembourg, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Mahaut de Châtillon, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Marguerite d'Enghien Comtesse de Brienne avant 1390. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1397, à l’âge de 27 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean de Luxembourg Comte de Saint-Pol 1370 in Beauvoir, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guy I de Luxembourg 30 und seine Mutter Mahaut de Châtillon 35. Er hat vor 1390 Marguerite d'Enghien Comtesse de Brienne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1397 im Alter von 27 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean de Luxembourg Comte de Saint-Pol è nato il nel 1370 nel Beauvoir, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Guy I de Luxembourg, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Mahaut de Châtillon, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Marguerite d'Enghien Comtesse de Brienne prima del 1390. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1397, all'età di 27 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean de Luxembourg Comte de Saint-Polが1370年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディマンチェビーウボイルで生まれた時，父Guy I de Luxembourgは30歳，母Mahaut de Châtillonは35歳であった。1390年以前にMarguerite d'Enghien Comtesse de Brienneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1397年に27歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean de Luxembourg Comte de Saint-Pol(이)가 1370년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 먼체 보보이르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guy I de Luxembourg(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Mahaut de Châtillon(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1390년 이전 Marguerite d'Enghien Comtesse de Brienne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1397년 27세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean de Luxembourg Comte de Saint-Pol nasceu em 1370, em Beauvoir, Manche, Basse-Normandie, França, seu pai, Guy I de Luxembourg, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Mahaut de Châtillon, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Marguerite d'Enghien Comtesse de Brienne antes 1390. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1397, com 27 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean de Luxembourg Comte de Saint-Pol родился в 1370 г. в местности бовоир, манч, бассе-норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Guy I de Luxembourg было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mahaut de Châtillon, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Marguerite d'Enghien Comtesse de Brienne перед 1390 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1397 г. в возрасте 27 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean de Luxembourg Comte de Saint-Pol nació en 1370, en Beauvoir, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Guy I de Luxembourg, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Mahaut de Châtillon, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Marguerite d'Enghien Comtesse de Brienne antes de 1390. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1397, a la edad de 27 años.
